'''wagobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadhouse|roadhouse]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadhouse|roadhouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wagobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wægebeth|wægebeth]] || [[word:wægebej|wægebej]] || [[word:wægebesh|wægebesh]] || [[word:wægebe|wægebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wagogoboth|wagogoboth]] || [[word:wagogoboj|wagogoboj]] || [[word:wagogobosh|wagogobosh]] || [[word:wagogobo|wagogobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wagoboth|wagoboth]] || [[word:wagoboj|wagoboj]] || [[word:wagobosh|wagobosh]] || [[word:wagobo|wagobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wagofboth|wagofboth]] || [[word:wagofboj|wagofboj]] || [[word:wagofbosh|wagofbosh]] || [[word:wagofbof|wagofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wagobotho|wagobotho]] || [[word:wagobojo|wagobojo]] || [[word:wagobosho|wagobosho]] || [[word:wagoboko|wagoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wagoboth|wagoboth]] || [[word:wagoboj|wagoboj]] || [[word:wagobosh|wagobosh]] || [[word:wagobo|wagobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wagobothol|wagobothol]] || [[word:wagobojol|wagobojol]] || [[word:wagoboshol|wagoboshol]] || [[word:wagobokol|wagobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wagobothotho|wagobothotho]] || [[word:wagobojojo|wagobojojo]] || [[word:wagoboshosho|wagoboshosho]] || [[word:wagoboko|wagoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wagobothon|wagobothon]] || [[word:wagobojon|wagobojon]] || [[word:wagoboshon|wagoboshon]] || [[word:wagobokon|wagobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wagobothoro|wagobothoro]] || [[word:wagobojoro|wagobojoro]] || [[word:wagoboshoro|wagoboshoro]] || [[word:wagobokoro|wagobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
